tagline: Your own AI assistant that runs entirely on this device. Private, fast, and works offline.
value_prop_privacy: Your conversations stay on your device — nothing is sent to the cloud
value_prop_offline: Works without internet after initial setup
empty_conversations: Your conversations will appear here. Start a new chat to begin!
desktop_banner_text: Get more power with the same privacy — try the desktop app
get_app_tagline: Download the desktop app for faster, fully-offline AI powered by your own hardware.
not_configured_notice: Release downloads are not configured for this deployment. Build the desktop app from source or check the project repository.
download_started_description: Your file is downloading to your Downloads folder. Open it once it finishes to install {{name}}.
not_found_description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
error_description: The app ran into an unexpected error. Reloading usually fixes it.
voice_description: Voice input requires downloading a speech recognition model (~640 MB). The model runs entirely in your browser for full privacy.
voice_download_failed: Download failed. Please check your connection and try again.
